archetype: The Performance Pro & Swiss Brutalism (Editorial Sports-Tech)

fonts.heading: Oswald
fonts.installation: Add Google Fonts link in index.html for Oswald, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono.

rules: Headings (Oswald) MUST be uppercase and use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter for a heavy-weight athletic scoreboard feel.
Body text (IBM Plex Sans) MUST use increased tracking for legibility.
Numbers, timers, and KPI data points MUST use IBM Plex Mono.
Never center align body text. Always left-align paragraphs, inputs, or dense content.
Use radical weight contrast: Font-black for hero text, font-light for sub-headers.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl uppercase tracking-tighter font-black leading-none

rules: No full-screen gradients. Use matte solid colors.
Use #CCFF00 (Volt Green) strictly for live status, progress, and 'kinetic triggers' (e.g., active AI computing, live match running).
Use #FF1E56 for CTAs and critical alerts.
Text over images MUST have text-shadow to meet WCAG AA contrast, or use a black gradient overlay (bg-black/40).

surface_strategies: Glassmorphism (Crystal Variant): For sticky headers and floating AI Chatbot. Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10. NEVER use fully transparent backgrounds for overlays.
Neumorphism (Tactile): Do not use soft shadows. Use 'Tactile Minimalism' with sharp 1px borders and no soft box-shadows.
Grid Borders (Technical Look): Use for the Ops Dashboard. Elements divided by 1px border-white/10 lines instead of floating cards.

icons.rules: Use Lucide-React. Do NOT use AI emoji characters for icons.

layouts.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, or p-12. Avoid cramped layouts.

grid_system.role_landing: Asymmetric Bento Grid (MODE A). Mix large hero imagery (col-span-8) with narrow tall stats or role selectors (col-span-4).
grid_system.ops_dashboard: High Density Grid (MODE B). Tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel utilized, h-full on children to ensure stretching.

sections.hero_role_switcher: Split screen or bold asymmetric blocks. Hovering on a role (Fan, Staff) shifts the background image.
sections.scoreboard_ticker: Use react-fast-marquee for live match updates, incident feeds, and transport ETAs running horizontally across the top or bottom.
sections.ai_concierge: Side drawer or floating window with dark-glass UI, featuring quick-prompt chips.
sections.incident_board: Terminal/Data layout. Rows of data with strict alignment and high contrast.

components.buttons: Sharp rectangular buttons (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). bg-[#FF1E56] text-white hover:bg-[#D81143]. Kinetic triggers use border-[#CCFF00] text-[#CCFF00].
components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn components heavily customized: border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white. Focus state: ring-2 ring-[#FF1E56].
components.cards: Cardless style. Flat surfaces with 1px border-white/10, no radius (rounded-none).
components.charts: Recharts. Use monochromatic white/grey lines with #CCFF00 (Volt) for the primary data series and #FF1E56 for anomalies.
components.heatmap_tiles: Grid of small square divs colored based on crowd density. Green (#00FF87), Yellow (#FFD600), Red (#FF1E56).

rules: Snappy and precise. No floaty easing.
Staggered reveals for dashboard KPIs and lists.
Hover states MUST explicitly change text and background color for contrast (e.g., hover:bg-white hover:text-black).

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to WCAG AA. Minimum 4.5:1 for normal text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='role-fan-btn', data-testid='ai-chat-input').
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on all interactive elements. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#CCFF00] focus:outline-none.
features: Accessibility Assistant view clearly separated with large tap targets.

image_urls.description: Dramatic aerial night view of an illuminated soccer stadium. Perfect for the main landing page background with a heavy bg-black/50 overlay.
Soccer fans cheering with flags, great for 'Fan' persona selector.
Modern subway train. Use for the transit recommendation card.
Modern control room panel, perfect for 'Staff' or 'Organizer' role selector.

3d_libraries_and_steps.recommendation: Use framer-motion for micro-interactions and react-fast-marquee for scoreboard tickers. 3D is not strictly necessary for this high-density dashboard, but Recharts is mandatory for data visualization.

instructions_to_main_agent: Focus on building a hybrid app with distinct flows: Role Selection Landing Page, Fan Experience (AI Concierge, Transport), and Staff Ops Dashboard (Real-time heatmaps, Incidents).
Implement a 'Marquee' across the top or bottom of the screen showing live Match Scores, Transportation Alerts, and Ops incidents using react-fast-marquee. Make it look like a stadium scoreboard.
For the Heatmap, build a CSS Grid of tiles showing crowd density at different stadium zones.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex asymmetric hero layouts, not restrictive UI library wrappers.
Make sure all components are highly accessible, prioritizing data visibility, color contrast, and focus states.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT use Inter or generic fonts. Strictly use Oswald for Headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
DO NOT make generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients. Create depth through layered design and sharp 1px borders.
DO NOT use the default Vercel/Stripe look. The aesthetic must be 'Elite Athleticism & Precision' - dark, intense, and highly functional.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
Never use fully transparent header backgrounds if content scrolls under them. Use backdrop-blur with a dark tint.
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Only use modern, sharp rectangular button styles. Hover states must be distinct.
Never use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). ONLY use the image URLs provided in the media section.
If any component needs icon, use lucide-react.
